summary: Iteration 82 - Document UX Improvements. Backend: 29/29 tests PASSED. All new features verified: (1) GET /download?inline=true returns Content-Disposition: inline; (2) GET /download (no param) returns Content-Disposition: attachment; (3) DELETE /document/{doc_id} deletes file + DB row, returns 404 for missing, 403 for unauthorized; (4) All existing endpoints still work. Frontend: Partner Pipeline has explicit two-step upload flow (stage file → Upload button + Cancel), View/Save/Delete buttons on documents, Financial Summary block on proposal_paid/awaiting_final_approval/case_created stages, indigo 'Awaiting Final Approval' banner. Admin Queue View button updated to use ?inline=true for consistency.
feature: 3 UX Fixes: (1) Document View opens inline (new tab) not download; (2) Partner document upload has explicit Upload button with filename preview + Cancel + Delete; (3) Partner sees Financial Summary at proposal_paid/awaiting_final_approval stages

frontend_tests.partner_pipeline_explicit_upload_flow: PASS - File selection shows filename preview + Upload button + Cancel button
frontend_tests.partner_pipeline_awaiting_final_approval: PASS - Indigo banner 'Submitted to Admin · Awaiting Final Approval'
frontend_tests.partner_pipeline_financial_summary: PASS - Shows PA Fee, Base Fee, Promo, Custom Discount, Upsells, Final Paid, Total Received
frontend_tests.admin_queue_view_toggles: PASS - Pending Review, 1st Approval, 2nd Approval, All Pre-Assessments

critical_code_review_comments: PreAssessmentPipeline.jsx correctly implements two-step upload flow with pendingUpload state
PreAssessmentPipeline.jsx View button uses ?inline=true for inline viewing
PreAssessmentQueue.jsx View button updated to use ?inline=true for consistency
Financial Summary block correctly shows full fee breakdown with emerald gradient
Indigo 'Awaiting Final Approval' banner correctly displayed at awaiting_final_approval stage

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and flows verified

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test PAs during testing: TEST_Iteration82_DocUX (proposal_sent), TEST_DeleteAuth_Client (payment_received with 1 doc)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 82 verified 3 UX fixes for document handling. Key features: (1) GET /api/pre-assessment/{pa_id}/document/{doc_id}/download?inline=true returns Content-Disposition: inline for viewing in browser; (2) Partner document upload now has explicit two-step flow - selecting file stages it with filename preview, then user clicks Upload button to confirm (data-testids: file-input-{paId}, upload-btn-{paId}, cancel-upload-{paId}); (3) Financial Summary block shows full fee breakdown (PA Fee, Base Fee, Promo discount, Custom Discount, Upsells, Final Paid) at proposal_paid/awaiting_final_approval/case_created stages; (4) Indigo 'Awaiting Final Approval' banner shown at awaiting_final_approval stage. Admin Queue View button updated to use ?inline=true for consistency with Partner Pipeline.

document_view_inline.description: View button opens file inline in new tab (not download)

explicit_upload_flow.description: Two-step upload: select file → see preview → click Upload
explicit_upload_flow.ui_elements: Filename preview, file size, doc type, Upload button, Cancel button

awaiting_final_approval_banner.description: Indigo banner shown when PA is at awaiting_final_approval stage
awaiting_final_approval_banner.text: Submitted to Admin · Awaiting Final Approval
awaiting_final_approval_banner.subtext: Admin will verify receipt + signed agreement and activate the case by assigning a Case Manager.
